feature_evidence.value: I just need to know what your business hours are, but this is extremely urgent and critical so please respond immediately!!

feature_evidence.interpretation: 8h to resolve — faster than typical for 'Critical' (~12h)

constraint_analysis: The request is routine ('Medium'-level), yet it was escalated to 'Critical'. Resolution took 8h (faster than typical for 'Critical' (~12h)). This over-prioritized ticket is a False Alarm (severity gap -2 levels).

feature_evidence.value: Could you tell me if you offer a student discount, it is an emergency and I need this answered ASAP!

constraint_analysis: The request is routine ('Low'-level), yet it was escalated to 'High'. Resolution took 20h (near typical for 'High' (~24h)). This over-prioritized ticket is a False Alarm (severity gap -2 levels).

feature_evidence.value: No rush at all, but I noticed I have been billed 4800 dollars instead of 48 for three months straight.

feature_evidence.interpretation: business-domain customer — higher impact if under-served

constraint_analysis: The content indicates 'Medium' severity, yet it was logged as 'Low'. Resolution took 55h (near typical for 'Low' (~45h)). This under-prioritized ticket is a Hidden Crisis (severity gap +1 levels).

feature_evidence.value: Everything looks great, except the app deleted all of my saved work and there seems to be no way to get it back.

constraint_analysis: The content indicates 'High' severity, yet it was logged as 'Low'. Resolution took 50h (near typical for 'Low' (~45h)). This under-prioritized ticket is a Hidden Crisis (severity gap +2 levels).
